about.title: I connect data, code & IA into systems that work
about.p1: I'm Crishtian, a frontend developer and automation specialist based in Peru. I build React JS interfaces, Power BI analytical dashboards, intelligent n8n workflows, and Claude AI solutions that save real time for real businesses.
about.p2: I don't just deliver code — I deliver systems that make decisions.

services.title: What I can do
services.sub: Three specialties working together so your business grows with real technology.

items.title: Frontend Development
items.desc: Modern reactive interfaces with React JS. Reusable components, optimized performance and exceptional UX.

items.title: Data Analytics
items.desc: Interactive dashboards with Power BI and augmented intelligence with Claude AI. Turn data into decisions.

items.title: Automation
items.desc: Smart workflows with n8n. Connect apps, eliminate repetitive tasks and boost your productivity.
